title: MLC-3 Mobile Laser Cannon

{{Quote|—That little ''MLC'' started rollin' and firin', takin' out equipment and personnel at random—|[[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]|<ref name="SW78" />}}
The '''MLC-3 Mobile Laser Cannon''' was a small, one-person [[Tank/Legends|tank]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]].

==Characteristics==
The MLC-3 Mobile Laser Cannon [[Tank/Legends|tank]]<ref name="SW" /> was designed for perimeter defense, allowing security teams to patrol a facility's surrounding terrain. It was armed with a pair of medium repeating [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannons]] and moved on heavy treads,<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|321|MLC-3}}</ref> with a compact chassis and removable transparent dome.<ref name="Kenner" />

While the MLC-3 was designed to operate with a single [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]],<ref name="Kenner" /> its motion and attack circuits could be jury-rigged to run autonomously, firing at random on a time program.<ref name="SW78" />

==History==
MLC-3s were used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] on [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] prior to the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|evacuation]] of [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]].<ref name="SW" />

According a tall tale told by [[Rebel pilot/Legends|rebel pilot]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]],<ref name="Wizard">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20031204hoth|text=Hoth: Under the Ice|int=Hoth: Under the Ice}}</ref> MLC-3s were used by scavenger [[Arns Grimraker]] and his associates while raiding the remains of the Battle of Hoth. One such unit was rigged by Antilles to fire upon the scavengers and their equipment, providing the distraction necessary for the pilot to escape the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] aboard the [[GR-75 medium transport/Legends|GR-75 medium transport]]<ref name="SW78" /> ''[[Death Merchant]]''.<ref name="Wizard" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:MLC-3_Mobile_Laser_Cannon.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Kenner's MLC-3 Mini-rig]]
The MLC-3 was one of [[Kenner Products|Kenner's]] [[Mini-Rigs]], and like many of the toys in that series, was an original design,<ref name="AFA">''[[Star Wars: The Action Figure Archive]]''</ref> though it has since appeared in [[Star Wars (1977) 78|''Star Wars'' (1977) 78]].<ref name="SW78" />

Although the name "Mobile Laser Cannon" suggests that the MLC-3's weapons are [[Laser/Legends|lasers]],<ref name="Kenner" /> they have been described as [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] cannons by ''The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia''<ref name="CSWE" /> and [[StarWars.com]]. The StarWars.com article "[[Offscreen, but Not Forgotten: Mini-Rigs, Body-Rigs, and Other Kenner Vehicles]]" incorrectly states that an MLC-3 was used by [[Wes Janson/Legends|Wes Janson]] in ''Hoth Stuff!'',<ref name="SW" /> when it was in fact used by Wedge Antilles.<ref name="SW78" />
